title: gastrochilus fasciculatus
intro: Gastrochilus fasciculatus, also known as the Himalayan orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and other mountain ranges in Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antidiabetic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gastrochilus fasciculatus include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in the form of tea, decoction, or powder, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
